candidate.objective: Skilled Poly Welder, Pipe Fitter, and Dogman with hands-on experience across major resource, port, and mining projects in Western Australia. Proficient in HDPE polywelding from DN90 through to DN1000 using McElroy, Dixon, and T500 machines. Experienced in fabrication, dogging, rigging, flange management, and dewatering operations. Site-inducted with Rio Tinto, ABRA Mine Site, and Lumsden Point Port. Holds butt welding (PMBWELD301E) and electrofusion (PMBWELD302E) competencies, and a Dogman/Rigger HRWL.

duties: Polywelding of HDPE pipelines from DN90 to DN250 using Dixon and T500 machines.
Installation of DN1000 steel pipeline for port infrastructure.
Construction and installation of weir boxes and pump systems.
Rigging and lifting operations in support of pipeline installation.
Pipe fitting and flange management to engineering specifications.

employment.employer: Western Ranges — Rio Tinto Project (via ACM Resources)
duties: Polywelding of HDPE pipelines from DN90 to DN630 using McElroy and Dixon machines.
Fabrication of pipeline spools and fittings to project specifications.
Dogging and rigging operations in support of pipeline and structural installation.

skills.detail: HDPE polywelding DN90–DN1000 using McElroy, Dixon, and T500 machines; butt welding and electrofusion.
Steel and HDPE pipe fitting, flange management, and spool fabrication.
Dogman and Rigger HRWL holder; experienced in rigging and lifting operations on mine and port sites.
Dewatering operations including pump and weir box installation.

certifications.details: National competency for HDPE butt welding.
National competency for HDPE electrofusion welding.
High Risk Work Licence — Dogman and Basic Rigging.
Competency to operate light vehicles on mine sites.
Competency to operate licensed vehicles on mine sites.
Four-wheel drive vehicle operation on unsealed roads.
Rio Tinto site induction — Western Ranges project.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
